summary: Completed testing of new Admin Webhooks management feature. All 12 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed - page loads correctly, all 3 sections render properly, forms are editable, save buttons work.

issues: Chart dimension warnings in console (cosmetic only - from recharts library)

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes on all interactive elements
API endpoints properly require authentication and return appropriate error codes
Templates use proper placeholders like {order_number}, {customer_name}, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Webhooks admin page fully tested at /panelgsnadminbackend/webhooks. All endpoints require admin authentication. Test webhook endpoint sends to real Discord URL. Page has 3 sections: Global Webhooks (order + payment URLs), Product Webhooks (shows products with configured webhooks), Message Templates (4 collapsible templates with editable title/content).

backend_apis: GET /api/admin/webhooks/global - Returns webhook settings (requires auth) - PASS
PUT /api/admin/webhooks/global - Saves webhook URLs (requires auth) - PASS
GET /api/admin/webhooks/products - Returns products with webhooks (requires auth) - PASS
GET /api/admin/webhooks/templates - Returns 4 templates with placeholders (requires auth) - PASS
PUT /api/admin/webhooks/templates - Saves edited templates (requires auth) - PASS
POST /api/admin/webhooks/templates/reset - Resets templates to defaults (requires auth) - PASS
POST /api/admin/webhooks/test - Sends test webhook (requires auth) - PASS
frontend_ui: Admin Webhooks page loads at /panelgsnadminbackend/webhooks - PASS
Global Webhooks section shows order and payment webhook inputs - PASS
Product Webhooks section shows products with connected webhooks - PASS
Message Templates section shows 4 collapsible templates - PASS
Expanding a template shows title input and content textarea - PASS
Save Webhooks button works for global webhooks - PASS
Save Templates button works for message templates - PASS
Webhooks link visible in sidebar under Settings - PASS
